title: [release-1.16] CVE-2022-21698: bump github.com/prometheus/client_golang to v1.11.1
body:
Pin a few containers dependencies to prevent them from being upgraded to versions that use features from newer versions of the standard library so that we can continue compiling with older versions of the compiler that we current when this branch was current.

Resolves: CVE-2022-21698
